business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

positives: Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
No OSHA citations in past 3 years
Long tenure — 24 years in business, 18 years with current management
concerns: No formal safety program in place
Older building at LOC-006 (1400 Enclave Parkway, built 1995)
Swimming pools, exercise rooms, and other amenities present
Claims in 2 of past 3 policy years
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2 claims in the past 3 years (1 in 2024, 0 in 2023, 1 in 2022). No cancellations or non-renewals.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas. 24 years in business, 18 years with current management. 145 full-time and 28 part-time employees. Hours of operation Mon-Sat 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: No formal safety program. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors and subcontractors. 24-hour doorperson/security on premises. All buildings fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior Insurance History: 2024 – CNA Financial, premium $414,601.77, 1 claim, no cancellations. 2023 – Zurich Insurance Group, premium $423,914.72, 0 claims, no cancellations. 2022 – American International Group, premium $447,842.42, 1 claim, no cancellations.
